title: carex notha
intro: Carex notha, also known as the Northern Sedge, is a species of sedge that is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Carex notha include its ability to reduce swelling and pain, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Carex notha can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it has also been used in salves and ointments to treat skin conditions and wounds.
